calendar.matters:
Petitioner David Salamon'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER DAVID SALAMON's Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar pursuant to stay order and appellate stay.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceeding
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. KEITH COCHRAN, Esq. of Fitzgerald Knaier LLP (tel: 619-241-4810) for Petitioner David Salamon.
Atty. MARCO MOLINA, Esq. and SHAIA STAMBUK, Esq. of Baker & Hostetler LLP (tel: 714-754-6600) for Respondent Orchid Global, Inc.

Hearing Re: RESPONDENT ORCHID GLOBAL, INC.'s Motion To Stay Proceeding.

Matter argued and submitted. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Respondent Orchid Global Inc. moves to stay this proceeding on grounds of forum non conveniens and because, it contends, a mandatory forum selection clause designates the Delaware Chancery Court as the sole forum for this action, brought by petitioner David Salamon under California law to inspect the books and records of Orchid. The court grants the request for judicial notice of the Delaware complaint filed by Orchid against Salamon. For the reasons stated herein, the court grants the motion to stay (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR# 10619 (tel: 925-954-9888 / email: raquel@transcriptlegal.com). (301/CVA)

Petitioner David Salamon'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jun-03-2025 Continued To Jul-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
